name: Mending Touch
description: A simple touch that restores a small amount of health to a single target.

card_images.description: A simple, smooth white wood border with light green filigree. The scene shows a female human healer with a focused expression, placing her hand on the arm of a large, bearded male warrior in heavy plate armor. A soft, green and white light emanates from her palm, knitting a shallow cut on his bicep closed.

name: Soothing Mist
description: Blankets a small area in a restorative mist, healing all allies within it over 8 seconds.

card_images.description: A simple, smooth white wood border with light green filigree. A female human healer stands with her arms outstretched, her eyes closed. A gentle, glowing green mist rolls out from her, enveloping her party—a heavily armored male tank and a lithe female human archer—who are visibly relaxing as their wounds close amidst the sparkling light.

name: Purify
description: Removes one harmful magical effect and one poison effect from an ally.

card_images.description: A simple, smooth white wood border with light green filigree. A large male warrior kneels, a sickly purple aura clinging to him from a goblin shaman's curse. The female human healer stands before him, her hand held out as a single drop of perfectly clear, radiant water falls from her fingertips onto his shoulder, shattering the dark aura into harmless motes of light.

name: Flash Heal
description: A quick, but mana-intensive burst of healing for a single target.

card_images.description: A simple, smooth white wood border with light green filigree. A hulking beast swipes its claws at a nimble male rogue. In a brilliant, sudden flash of golden light from the female human healer's hand, a deep gash on the rogue's side is instantly sealed just as he dodges away.

name: Ancestral Spirit
description: Calls upon an ancestral spirit to watch over an ally. If they die within 30 seconds, they are resurrected with 40% health and mana.

card_images.description: A simple, smooth white wood border with light green filigree. A female human healer completes an incantation, and a translucent, benevolent spirit guardian materializes behind her party's broad-shouldered male warrior, placing a ghostly hand on his shoulder as he charges towards a massive ogre.

name: Chain Heal
description: Heals a target, then jumps to two nearby allies, healing for a reduced amount with each jump.

card_images.description: A simple, smooth white wood border with light green filigree. The female human healer points at the party's male tank, who is engaged with several goblins. A bolt of turquoise healing energy strikes him, then arcs gracefully to a nearby female human archer, and finally to a male rogue, connecting the three allies in a chain of restorative light.

name: Sanctuary
description: Consecrates the ground in a large area. Allies standing within it are healed every 2 seconds and take 10% less damage.

card_images.description: A simple, smooth white wood border with light green filigree. A female human healer kneels, pressing both palms to the ground. A large, circular area around her and her party—a male tank and two other DPS—erupts in holy, golden light. Faint, ethereal angelic wings are visible in the glowing pattern on the ground, shielding them from a volley of monstrous attacks.

name: Life Link
description: Links the caster to an ally for 15 seconds. The ally receives 50% of all healing the caster receives.

card_images.description: A simple, smooth white wood border with light green filigree. The female human healer stands back-to-back with a wounded male warrior. A vibrant, green tether of light connects their chests. As she casts a small heal on herself, a pulse of the same green light travels through the tether, mending the warrior's wounds.

name: Beacon of Light
description: A powerful, single-target heal that also grants the target a shield absorbing a moderate amount of damage.

card_images.description: A simple, smooth white wood border with light green filigree. A massive, horned demon is about to bring its club down on the party's male tank. The female human healer raises her staff, and a pillar of divine, golden light descends from the sky to envelop the tank, instantly healing him and forming a protective, shimmering bubble that deflects the blow.

name: Divine Hymn
description: The ultimate healing spell. Channels divine energy to heal all nearby allies for a massive amount over 8 seconds.

card_images.description: A simple, smooth white wood border with light green filigree. The female human healer levitates slightly, her eyes glowing with pure white energy and ethereal wings of light spread behind her. As she sings, powerful waves of holy light radiate outwards, washing over her entire party and healing their grievous injuries as they fight off a horde of shadow beasts.

name: Earthen Grasp
description: Summons stone hands from the ground to root a single enemy in place for 4 seconds.

card_images.description: A dark, swirling purple border with etched arcane runes. A female human mage with her hands thrust towards the ground summons a spell. In front of her, two large hands made of rock and earth erupt from the cavern floor to clutch the legs of a charging, goblin-like monster, holding it fast while her male warrior companion prepares to strike.

name: Frost Nova
description: An explosion of ice erupts from the caster, rooting all nearby enemies for 3 seconds and slowing them for 5 seconds after.

card_images.description: A dark, swirling purple border with etched arcane runes. Surrounded by snarling, wolf-like monsters, a female human mage slams her staff into the ground. A ring of sharp ice crystals explodes outwards from her, instantly encasing the creatures' feet in thick frost. Her party, a male tank and female human archer, use the opportunity to attack.

name: Mind Lock
description: Locks an enemy's mind, silencing them and preventing any spellcasting for 5 seconds.

card_images.description: A dark, swirling purple border with etched arcane runes. An enemy monster, a grotesque shaman, is chanting a dark spell. A female human caster points a finger at it, and a glowing purple padlock of psychic energy materializes over the shaman's mouth, silencing its chant and causing its spell to fizzle harmlessly.

name: Cyclone
description: Traps an enemy in a vortex of wind, making them invulnerable but unable to act for 6 seconds.

card_images.description: A dark, swirling purple border with etched arcane runes. A female human druid raises her arms, and a miniature tornado forms around a hulking, heavily armored monster. The creature is lifted off the ground, spinning helplessly within the vortex of wind, while her party—a male warrior and a male rogue—focus their attacks on other enemies.

name: Shadow Prison
description: Binds an enemy with tendrils of shadow, stunning them for 4 seconds. Deals shadow damage if the stun is broken early.

card_images.description: A dark, swirling purple border with etched arcane runes. A female human warlock gestures towards a dangerous, winged demon. Inky black shadows with glowing purple edges rise from the floor, forming into tendrils that envelop and bind the struggling monster, stunning it completely as her party prepares a coordinated assault.

name: Ember Bolt
description: Fires a concentrated spark of flame. 25% chance to Ignite for 3s.

card_images.description: A charred wood border with glowing embers in the cracks. A female human pyromancer, her hair like flickering flames, thrusts her palm forward. A single, fast-moving bolt of concentrated fire streaks from her hand across a dark cave, striking a goblin monster in the chest and causing it to burst into flames.

name: Magma Blast
description: Hurls a sphere of molten rock that explodes on impact, applying Ignite to all targets.

card_images.description: A charred wood border with glowing embers in the cracks. A female human sorceress conjures a large, airborne sphere of molten rock above her head. With a powerful shout, she hurls it into a group of armored orc monsters, where it impacts the ground in a fiery explosion, sending them flying.

name: Cataclysm Meteor
description: Calls down a burning star. Scorches the ground; Ignited enemies on scorched ground take double damage.

card_images.description: A charred wood border with glowing embers in the cracks. A female human mage, her arms raised to the sky, channels immense power. A colossal meteor, wreathed in apocalyptic flames, descends from the smoke-filled sky, crashing into a massive, dragon-like monster and scorching the earth around it. Her party members watch in awe from a safe distance.

name: Frost Needle
description: Shoots a jagged icicle that applies Chill, reducing speed by 20%.

card_images.description: A border of jagged, frosted blue ice. A female human cryomancer flicks her wrist, launching a single, sharp icicle from her fingertips. The needle of ice flies through the air, leaving a trail of cold mist, and impales the leg of a fast-moving reptilian monster, causing frost to creep across its scales and slow it down.

name: Glacial Spike
description: Summons a massive pillar of ice. Freezes Chilled enemies; deals double damage to Frozen targets.

card_images.description: A border of jagged, frosted blue ice. A female human frost mage thrusts her hands towards a giant, troll-like monster that is already covered in a thin layer of ice. A gigantic, jagged spike of blue-white ice erupts violently from the frozen ground beneath the creature, impaling it and shattering it completely.

name: Absolute Zero
description: A massive blizzard that Shatters enemies, instantly dealing 30% of their missing health.

card_images.description: A border of jagged, frosted blue ice. A female human frost mage floats at the center of a world-ending blizzard. The air around her shimmers with immense cold as she channels the storm, which pelts a horde of demonic monsters with razor-sharp ice, causing them to shatter into frozen fragments.

name: Static Spark
description: Fast-tracking bolt with high crit chance. Crits restore 2% Mana.

card_images.description: A polished steel border with crackling lines of electricity. A female human storm-caller, her body crackling with energy, snaps her fingers. A small, intensely bright yellow spark of lightning jumps from her hand to a distant, bat-like monster, electrocuting it mid-flight. Her male tank companion watches, shield ready.

name: Chain Lightning
description: Arcs between 4 targets. Each jump increases damage by 10%.

card_images.description: A polished steel border with crackling lines of electricity. A female human shaman raises her hand, unleashing a powerful fork of blue-white lightning. The bolt strikes the lead orc in a group of monsters, then arcs violently to three others behind it, electrocuting them all in a single, brilliant flash.

name: Storm Avatar
description: Continuous beam that arcs to all enemies in range. Can move while channeling.

card_images.description: A polished steel border with crackling lines of electricity. A female human caster transforms, her body becoming pure electrical energy with eyes of lightning. She unleashes a continuous, blinding beam of lightning from her hands that arcs to every monster in the cavern, while she calmly walks through the chaos, untouched.

name: Arcane Dart
description: Homing orb of pure force. Ignores 15% Magic Resistance.

card_images.description: A deep purple border with glowing arcane symbols. A female human arcanist, her eyes glowing with pink energy, fires a single, glowing missile of pink and purple magic. The dart curves through the air, intelligently bypassing a pillar to strike a cowering goblin monster hiding behind it.

name: Homing Salvo
description: Fires 5 missiles. Each hit increases the damage of the next missile by 5%.

card_images.description: A deep purple border with glowing arcane symbols. A female human battlemage unleashes a volley of five magical missiles from her outstretched hands. The purple projectiles fan out, then converge on a single, large stone golem, striking it in rapid succession, each impact glowing brighter than the last.

name: Aether Torrent
description: Fires 10 missiles per second for 6s. Deals Pure damage, ignoring all armor and shields.

card_images.description: A deep purple border with glowing arcane symbols. A female human grand magus unleashes an overwhelming, continuous torrent of pure, white-hot arcane energy from her hands. The beam of raw power cuts through a shielded, monstrous knight, ignoring its defenses completely and disintegrating it on the spot.

name: Taunt
description: Forces a single enemy to attack you for 3 seconds.

card_images.description: A thick, forged iron border with heavy rivets. A large, heavily armored male warrior, protecting his female human healer companion, slams his shield and lets out a powerful, roaring shout. Red, concentric rings of force emanate from his mouth, compelling a massive, charging beast to ignore the healer and focus its rage entirely on him.

name: Shield Block
description: Raises your shield, blocking the next physical attack made against you within 6 seconds.

card_images.description: A thick, forged iron border with heavy rivets. A hulking, club-wielding monster swings down at a female human warrior. Just before impact, she expertly raises her large, steel kite shield, deflecting the massive club with a bright spark and a loud clang. Her male rogue party member prepares to counter-attack.

name: Iron Skin
description: Hardens your skin to be like iron, reducing physical damage taken by 40% for 12 seconds.

card_images.description: A thick, forged iron border with heavy rivets. A female human tank, beset by multiple goblin monsters, activates a defensive skill. Her skin shimmers and hardens, taking on the metallic sheen and texture of solid iron. The goblins' crude swords bounce harmlessly off her transformed arms.

name: Shield Wall
description: The ultimate defensive cooldown. Reduces all damage taken by 60% for 12 seconds.

card_images.description: A thick, forged iron border with heavy rivets. A female human warrior stands firm as a massive dragon monster breathes a torrent of fire at her party. She raises her shield, and a wall of massive, ethereal shields materializes around her and her allies, the flames washing over the magical barrier harmlessly.

name: Avatar
description: Transforms into a colossal stone avatar for 20 seconds, increasing damage dealt, making you immune to movement impairing effects, and generating massive threat with every attack.

card_images.description: A thick, forged iron border with heavy rivets. A female human warrior, facing a colossal demon, begins to transform. She grows to an immense size, her body becoming living, cracked stone with molten-hot light shining from within. In her new, colossal form, she easily stops the demon's punch with one hand.
